evidence: plugin.json line 8 declares version 2.5.2; SKILL.md frontmatter line 10 declares version 2.5.3 — confirmed by reading both files
description: plugin.json version field (2.5.2) does not match SKILL.md metadata version (2.5.3); manifest lags by one patch release
suggested_fix: Bump plugin.json version to 2.5.3 to match SKILL.md

evidence: Line 569: fs.writeFileSync(q.file, Buffer.from(resp.result.data, 'base64')) — q.file is Object.fromEntries(parsed.searchParams) with no path restriction
description: Unvalidated ?file= query parameter passed directly to fs.writeFileSync; any local caller can write arbitrary data to any filesystem path accessible by the Node.js process
suggested_fix: Restrict q.file to os.tmpdir() or a configurable safe directory; reject paths containing '..' or absolute paths outside the allowed prefix

evidence: Line 418: const expr = body || q.expr || 'document.title'; passed to Runtime.evaluate on line 419-422 with no validation; proxy has no authentication
description: The /eval endpoint executes unvalidated JavaScript from any local caller in the user's Chrome browser via CDP; the localhost-only binding reduces but does not eliminate the attack surface
suggested_fix: Add a shared-secret token requirement for the /eval endpoint, or explicitly document the local-trust security model in the skill's README

description: SQL conditions built with string interpolation; only single-quote escaping is applied; execFileSync prevents shell injection but SQL injection via other metacharacters is theoretically possible against the local SQLite copy
suggested_fix: Use a Node.js SQLite binding with parameterised queries, or at minimum sanitise all SQL metacharacters not just single quotes

description: Vague quantifier '合适' (suitable/appropriate) in '请积极在任务合适时组合使用' — no concrete criteria specified for when a task is suitable for Jina
suggested_fix: Enumerate the specific page types or task characteristics that make Jina the preferred pre-processing layer

description: Vague quantifier '合理' (reasonable) in '鼓励合理分治给子 Agent 并行执行' — the adjacent decision table helps but the prose framing offers no actionable threshold
suggested_fix: Remove the vague adverb or anchor it to the decision table criteria immediately below

description: Vague quantifier '有必要' (when necessary) in '如果发现了有必要记录经验的新站点或新模式' — no criteria given for what makes recording necessary
suggested_fix: Specify concrete conditions: e.g. 'record when a non-obvious URL pattern, anti-scraping behaviour, or login flow was encountered'

description: Vague quantifier '大量' (large amount) in '页面中存在大量已加载但未展示的内容' — imprecise generalisation
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete description of the DOM pattern, e.g. 'elements that exist in the DOM tree but are outside the viewport or hidden by CSS'

description: Vague marketing term 'intelligent' in plugin description field — 'intelligent tool selection' provides no operational definition of the selection logic
suggested_fix: Replace with a specific description, e.g. 'rule-based tool selection (WebSearch / WebFetch / curl / CDP) based on URL availability and login-state requirements'

evidence: plugin.json version: 2.5.2; SKILL.md version: 2.5.3 — both files read and compared directly
description: Version declared in plugin.json (2.5.2) diverges from SKILL.md frontmatter (2.5.3); SKILL.md body references v2.5.3 migration notes, confirming SKILL.md is the authoritative source
suggested_fix: Align plugin.json version to 2.5.3; consider adding a CI check that asserts plugin.json and SKILL.md versions match
